# web-have-sounds

A zero-dependency, procedural audio engine for the web. Synthesize tactile UI sounds and ambient loops in real-time using the Web Audio API.

## Resources
- Full documentation: https://web-have-sounds.taohq.org/llms-full.txt
- GitHub Repo: https://github.com/NormVg/web-have-sound
- NPM Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@thenormvg/web-have-sounds

## Installation
NPM: `npm install @thenormvg/web-have-sounds`
Agent Skill: `npx skills add normvg/web-have-sound --skill web-have-sounds`

Made with love by TheAlphaOnes.
